title: Karpuzbaba's Classic Texture Pack
description: This texture pack brings a 128x resolution retro-cartoon style to Minecraft. With smooth lines and vibrant colors.
body:
Karpuzbaba's Classic Texture Pack 128x Resolution

This texture pack brings a 128x resolution retro-cartoon style to Minecraft. With smooth lines and vibrant colors, it transforms blocks and items into a crisp, nostalgic look while keeping the original charm of the game intact.

Every texture has been carefully redesigned to feel consistent and polished, from swords to building materials. Inspired by classic retro visuals, it delivers a playful cartoon aesthetic that feels both fresh and timeless.
